entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: An important food grain legume and essential component of crop rotations throughout the world

entities.name: LOW TEMPERATURE
entities.description: Environmental condition characterized by low temperatures that limit crop adaptation and productivity

entities.name: HIGH TEMPERATURE
entities.description: Environmental condition characterized by high temperatures that limit crop adaptation and productivity

entities.name: COLD STRESS
entities.description: Stress induced by low temperatures occurring in late vegetative and reproductive stages

entities.name: FREEZING TEMPERATURE
entities.description: Temperatures between -1.5°C to 15°C that are a major problem during the seedling stage

entities.name: CHILLING TEMPERATURE
entities.description: Low temperatures that specifically affect the flowering stage

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The capacity of the crop to produce, limited by temperature extremes

entities.name: ADAPTATION
entities.description: The ability of the crop to adjust to its environment, limited by temperature extremes

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain produced, influenced by temperature and flowering timing

entities.name: FLOWERING
entities.description: The phenological stage of flower production, timing of which is regulated by temperature

entities.name: VEGETATIVE STAGE
entities.description: A growth stage of the plant where cold stress generally occurs

entities.name: REPRODUCTIVE STAGE
entities.description: A growth stage of the plant where cold stress and high temperature damage occur

entities.name: SEEDLING STAGE
entities.description: An early growth stage of the plant affected by freezing temperatures

entities.name: PHENOLOGICAL STAGES
entities.description: The various stages of plant development throughout its life cycle

entities.name: MEDITERRANEAN AREAS
entities.description: Geographical regions where winter-sown chickpea is grown and affected by temperature stress

entities.name: TEMPERATE REGIONS
entities.description: Geographical regions where autumn-sown crops are grown and affected by freezing temperatures

entities.name: SOUTH AUSTRALIA
entities.description: A region most affected by chilling temperatures at flowering

entities.name: NORTH INDIA
entities.description: A region most affected by chilling temperatures at flowering

entities.name: SOUTH ASIA
entities.description: A region where high temperatures cause damage during the reproductive stage

entities.name: SPRING-SOWN REGIONS
entities.description: Regions where high temperatures cause damage during the reproductive stage
